rules: riido-daemon must not redefine shared task/IR/provider capability facts.
When both daemon and control-plane need the same DTO/schema, promote it to riido-contracts first.
Server runtime behavior stays in riido-control-plane.
riido-contracts owns the shared meaning of agent profile fields and instruction limits.
riido-daemon owns only customer-PC runtime consumption of an assigned instruction value.
The model catalog is a runtime-scoped contracts/control-plane read-model fact.
downstream_boundary_note: That manifest is a downstream boundary check, not a replacement for contracts/control-plane SSOT.
